title: Blooming Queens Spring Show
description:
A high-kicking, laugh-out-loud spectacle blooming with sequins, sass, and standing ovations. Costumes sparkle, jokes fly, and the queens serve it all night long.

Funny Girls' Blooming Queens bursts onto the stage in an explosion of colour, petals, and pure springtime energy. From Kylie to ABBA, Gloria Gaynor to Shania Twain, this show is your official permission slip to leave winter behind and dance like nobody's watching. Expect gorgeous choreography, cheeky garden-party chaos, and a finale so bright and fierce it'll warm you from the inside out.

Key Highlights

Jaw-Dropping Drag Performances: Floral costumes, and routines bursting with colour and sass.

Spring Anthems Reimagined: Hits from Kylie, ABBA, Gloria Gaynor, and Shania Twain.

High-Energy Acts: High-kicking, hip-shaking numbers that'll have the whole table on their feet.

Laugh-Out-Loud Comedy: Cheeky hosts, petal-perfect punchlines, and chaos from our fabulous queens.

Iconic Venue: Springtime spectacle inside the historic 1939 Art Deco Funny Girls theatre.

This is what grinning ‘til your cheeks hurt looks like.

title: Spring Fling
description:
A burst of feel‑good fun, fierce performances, and flirty springtime chaos you won’t want to miss!

Funny Girls' Spring Fling explodes onto the stage with more energy, more attitude, and more pure pop chaos than ever before. Featuring the incredible Phoenix Knights leading the charge through anthems from Dua Lipa, Beyoncé, and Lady Gaga, this is the show that turns a night out into a full-blown event. Expect jaw-dropping performances, non-stop laughs, and a finale so electrifying it'll have the whole room on their feet.

KeyHighlights

Chart-Topping Anthems: Dua Lipa, Beyoncé, Charli XCX, and Lady Gaga served up with full Funny Girls sass.

Starring Phoenix Knights: The sensational Phoenix Knights takes centre stage.

Jaw-Dropping Drag Performances: High-energy routines, stunning costumes, and choreography.

Laugh-Out-Loud Comedy: Sharp hosts, big punchlines, and the kind of chaos only Funny Girls can pull off.

Iconic Venue: Spring's biggest party inside the historic 1939 Art Deco Funny Girls theatre.

title: Hot Girl Summer
description:
Ready for a night of non-stop summer spectacle?

Funny Girls’ Hot Girl Summer opens with a Gloria Estefan megamix, then rolls into a drag-powered jukebox of Cher, Madonna, Britney and Tina. Expect stunning choreography, laugh-out-loud comedy, surprise chickens, and a disco finale that brings the house down. It’s sequins, sass and surprises from start to finish.

Key Highlights

  • Featuring hits from Cher, Madonna, Britney, and Tina Turner
  • Comedy twists, surprise numbers (yes, even dancing chickens)
  • Dazzling costumes and West End-worthy choreography
  • Finale so fierce, you’ll leave breathless and glitter-covered
  • Iconic Venue: Held in the glamorous 1939 Art Deco Funny Girls theatre.
